# Array Manipulation

<div class='challenge_problem_statement'><div class='msB challenge_problem_statement_body'><div class='hackdown-content'><style id="MathJax_SVG_styles">.MathJax_SVG_Display {text-align: center; margin: 1em 0em; position: relative; display: block!important; text-indent: 0; max-width: none; max-height: none; min-width: 0; min-height: 0; width: 100%}

</style><svg style="display: none;"><defs id="MathJax_SVG_glyphs"></defs></svg><p>Starting with a 1-indexed array of zeros and a list of operations, for each operation add a value to each array element between two given indices, inclusive.  Once all operations have been performed, return the maximum value in the array.  </p>

<p><strong>Example</strong> <br>
